_meta.name: Signature Block Rules
_meta.description: Signature block placement and formatting rules

S-001.description: Signature line starts at the center of the page

S-002.description: Signature line begins on the fourth line below the final body text

S-003.description: Do not include a complimentary close (e.g., 'Sincerely', 'Respectfully')

S-004.description: Copy-to block begins on the second line below the signature block

S-005.description: A signature page must have at least two lines of body text preceding the signature

S-006.description: If signature won't fit, start new page with continuation header and carry at least 2 body lines

S-007.description: Distribution block renders after signature block and before Copy to block

S-008.description: Distribution mode controls whether To line is rendered

behavior.to_plus_distribution: To line rendered as group title

S-009.description: Distribution entries can be rendered in multiple layout formats

behavior.single_column: Entries listed one per line at left margin
behavior.columns: Entries arranged in two columns with balanced row order
behavior.paragraph: Entries rendered as comma-separated wrapping text

S-010.description: Copy to block renders after Distribution block (if present) or after signature block

S-011.description: Copy to entries can be rendered in multiple layout formats

behavior.single_column: Entries listed one per line at left margin
behavior.columns: Entries arranged in two columns with balanced row order
behavior.paragraph: Entries rendered as comma-separated wrapping text

S-012.description: Distribution block always appears before Copy to block when both are present

S-013.description: Copy to is informational only and never suppresses To, Via, Distribution, or other header fields
